name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Cuban government issues mass pardon, freeing over 2,000 prisoners.

fullText: BREAKING: Pete Hegseth fires two more top generals, alongside Army Chief of Staff.

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Artemis II has completed its nominal translunar injection burn, & the crew is now officially on its way to the moon.
